abstract.t:
This document specifies KHALED Routing Protocol (KRP) which is an Exterior Gateway Protocol (EGP) that introduces a new way of routing IP packets from the source to the destination through different Autonomous Systems (ASs).
The enhancements that KRP adds are:
a) Decreasing the BGP routing table. b) Enhancing the routing function. c) Enhancing the QoS.
KRP sometimes referred to as Regional Routing Protocol (RRP).
